news.title: Minimum Salary Changes Announced
news.snippet: Updated December 24, 2025. Effective January 2026, the national minimum wage increased to ALL 50,000 gross per month – up from ALL 40,000.

news.title: Australian gas exporters will be forced to set aside local supply for domestic users
